description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow enclosed by a perimeter wall, featuring a driveway with a parked car, a front gate, and a landscaped yard with green grass. The main structure includes a flat roof, large windows, and sliding glass doors that open onto a wooden deck with a swimming pool and an outdoor dining area shaded by a pergola. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen spaces, as well as private rooms and bathrooms. The backyard is designed for leisure, with a pool, deck, and garden beds, while the front yard is paved for vehicle access. The exterior is finished in white and gray tones, with wooden and glass accents. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, open-plan interior, large windows, a driveway, and a backyard featuring a pool and deck. The exterior combines white, gray, wood, and glass elements within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, car, main entrance, large windows, and the backyard pool and deck area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the pool, wooden deck, outdoor dining area, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the driveway, the front gate, and the side garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the backyard, pool, deck, and the rear garden, with the car and driveway visible on the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
